summary: v1 -> v2 update: 15 total changes. Business Info: 1 change(s); Hours And Schedule: 4 change(s); Services: 1 change(s); Emergency Config: 2 change(s); Transfer Config: 1 change(s); Other: 6 change(s)

business_info.new_value: 7200 East Colfax Avenue, Building C, Denver, Colorado 80220

emergency_config.new_value: Collect caller details and confirm follow-up during business hours

other.old_value: Caller reaches Clara after business hours. Clara greets the caller and acknowledges after-hours status. Clara asks for the purpose of the call. Clara determines if this is an emergency. If EMERGENCY: Clara immediately collects name, callback number, and location/address. Clara attempts to transfer to on-call personnel (On-call technician, front desk). If transfer fails, Clara assures the caller that someone will call back shortly. If NOT EMERGENCY: Clara collects details and confirms follow-up during next business day. Clara asks if there's anything else needed. Clara closes the call.
